headline: Is NextEra Energy (NEE) Priced Right After Mixed Signals From Dividends And Earnings Multiples
summary: If you are wondering whether NextEra Energy at US$85.12 is giving you fair value for the risk you are taking, you are asking the right question for this stock. The share price has returned 0.6% over the last week, is down 10.2% over the last month, and is up 5.2% year to date and 20.0% over the past year, which gives a mixed picture of recent momentum and shifting risk perception.
